open_gaps: S0 is unresolved: the candidate neither defines
nor specifies the graph convention or the status of 0 as a limit ordinal. It begins to adopt a convention but terminates before stating one and does not separate inequivalent interpretations.
S1 is wholly unaddressed: no finite-separator rank is defined and no equivalence with raylessness is proved.
S2 is wholly unaddressed: no elimination-forest construction, converse comparability-graph argument, or preservation of inherited ordinal order type is established.
S3 is unaddressed: no same-cardinality antichain lemma or deduction for infinite initial ordinals is proved.
S4 and S5 are unaddressed: the regular-cardinal block claims, finite-pattern separation lemma, and claimed positive range below omega cubed are not reconstructed or checked.
C1, C2, and C3 are unaddressed: no finite-transversal classification, star obstruction analysis, ordered finite model, antichain-profile computation, or scalable counterexample is supplied.
P1, P2, P3, and P4 are unaddressed: no ordinal demand structure, concentration-or-front dichotomy, omega-cubed stress test, or hierarchical disjoint-refinement theorem is given.
B1 and B2 are unaddressed: none of the necessary constraints or the depth-tail fusion principle at omega_1^(omega+2) is verified or refuted.
G1 is absent: no recursive characterization of the qualifying limit ordinals is proposed or tested.
GOAL is wholly unresolved: the candidate gives no classification and proves or disproves the statement for no nontrivial class of limit ordinals.

notes:
